metadata.description: Weighted factors for computing upset probability scores for first-round matchups

seed_line_base_rate.description: Historical upset rate for this seed matchup from seed-history.json

adjEM_gap.description: AdjEM difference (higher minus lower seed). Smaller gap → higher upset risk. Gap < 5 is extreme risk.
adjEM_gap.scoring: gap ≥ 20 → 0 pts; gap 10-20 → 5 pts; gap 5-10 → 12 pts; gap < 5 → 25 pts

three_pt_variance.description: Higher-seed team's three_pt_variance_risk_score. High variance = upset vulnerability even for top seeds.

close_game_performance.description: Higher-seed's close-game win % vs expected for their seed. Underperforming = risk.

ft_pressure.description: FT% drop in close games vs season average. Negative delta = panic free throws = upset risk.

momentum.description: Momentum flags. Cold higher seed vs hot lower seed amplifies upset risk.
momentum.scoring: higher seed hot → 0; neutral/neutral → 2; higher seed cold → 4; cold vs hot → 6

first_tournament_coach.description: Is the higher-seed's coach in their first NCAA tournament? First-timers freeze.

automatic_investigate.description: Matchups where Chaos Agent always digs deeper regardless of composite score
conditions: adjEM_gap < 3.0 between any two R64 opponents
coaching.first_tournament = true for higher seed with seed 1-4
momentum.flag = 'cold' for higher seed AND momentum.flag = 'hot' for lower seed

never_pick_upset.description: Matchups Chaos Agent avoids regardless of score

historical_validation.5v12_accuracy: Correctly flagged 68% of 12-seed upsets with score > 48
historical_validation.6v11_accuracy: Correctly flagged 71% of 11-seed upsets with score > 48
historical_validation.7v10_accuracy: Correctly flagged 58% of 10-seed upsets with score > 48
historical_validation.most_predictive_factor: adjEM_gap (weight 0.25) — efficiency gap is the single best predictor
historical_validation.least_predictive_factor: momentum (weight 0.06) — improves narrative quality but marginal prediction value
historical_validation.notes: Three-point variance factor dramatically improved after adding 2018-2022 data. FT pressure underperfoms in regular season stats but is highly relevant in neutral-site tournament games.
known_limitations: Model trained primarily on power-conference teams; mid-major upset patterns may differ
Injury data is underweighted — significant injuries can override composite score entirely
